texts.full_text: & Patten, for appellee. Judges Crumlish, Jr., Kramer and Mencer, sitting as a panel of three. Opinion by Judge Crumlish, Jr. Author: Crumlish [ 3 Pa. Commw. Page 367]This appeal involves the reversal by the Court of Common Pleas of Chester County of the decision of the Civil Service Commission of the Borough of Downingtown. The Commission had dismissed Edgar W. Donnon, a patrolman, from the police force. The Court of Common Pleas, upon review, found that the Commission's decision was not supported by substantial evidence and ordered Donnon's reinstatement with back pay. The primary issue on appeal is whether the Civil Service Commission's decision to dismiss Donnon was supported by substantial evidence. The facts of the case, as found by the Commission, are as follows: Donnon, while on duty, engaged in a high-speed
